title: Cyclic Code Operation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of encoding and error detection using cyclic codes, highlighting the role of generator polynomials and modulo-2 division.
relationships: Dataword is multiplied by x^(n-k) to create space for parity bits
Result is divided (modulo-2) by G(x) to find remainder
Remainder is appended to dataword to form transmitted codeword
Received codeword is divided by G(x) to calculate syndrome
Syndrome of 0 indicates no error; non-zero syndrome indicates error
